speaker: BANQUO
text: Thou hast it now—king, Cawdor, Glamis, all

speaker: BANQUO
text: As the Weïrd Women promised, and I fear

speaker: BANQUO
text: Thou played’st most foully for ’t. Yet it was said

speaker: BANQUO
text: It should not stand in thy posterity,

speaker: BANQUO
text: But that myself should be the root and father

speaker: BANQUO
text: Of many kings. If there come truth from them

speaker: BANQUO
text: (As upon thee, Macbeth, their speeches shine)

speaker: BANQUO
text: Why, by the verities on thee made good,

speaker: BANQUO
text: May they not be my oracles as well,

speaker: BANQUO
text: And set me up in hope? But hush, no more.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Here’s our chief guest.

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: If he had been forgotten,

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: It had been as a gap in our great feast

speaker:
LADY
               
              MACBETH
text: And all-thing unbecoming.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Tonight we hold a solemn supper, sir,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And I’ll request your presence.

speaker: BANQUO
text: Let your Highness

speaker: BANQUO
text: Command upon me, to the which my duties

speaker: BANQUO
text: Are with a most indissoluble tie

speaker: BANQUO
text: Forever knit.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Ride you this afternoon?

speaker: BANQUO
text: Ay, my good lord.

speaker: MACBETH
text: We should have else desired your good advice

speaker: MACBETH
text: (Which still hath been both grave and prosperous)

speaker: MACBETH
text: In this day’s council, but we’ll take tomorrow.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Is ’t far you ride?

speaker: BANQUO
text: As far, my lord, as will fill up the time

speaker: BANQUO
text: ’Twixt this and supper. Go not my horse the better,

speaker: BANQUO
text: I must become a borrower of the night

speaker: BANQUO
text: For a dark hour or twain.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Fail not our feast.

speaker: BANQUO
text: My lord, I will not.

speaker: MACBETH
text: We hear our bloody cousins are bestowed

speaker: MACBETH
text: In England and in Ireland, not confessing

speaker: MACBETH
text: Their cruel parricide, filling their hearers

speaker: MACBETH
text: With strange invention. But of that tomorrow,

speaker: MACBETH
text: When therewithal we shall have cause of state

speaker: MACBETH
text: Craving us jointly. Hie you to horse. Adieu,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Till you return at night. Goes Fleance with you?

speaker: BANQUO
text: Ay, my good lord. Our time does call upon ’s.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I wish your horses swift and sure of foot,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And so I do commend you to their backs.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Farewell.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Let every man be master of his time

speaker: MACBETH
text: Till seven at night. To make society

speaker: MACBETH
text: The sweeter welcome, we will keep ourself

speaker: MACBETH
text: Till suppertime alone. While then, God be with you.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Sirrah, a word with you. Attend those men

speaker: MACBETH
text: Our pleasure?

speaker: SERVANT
text: They are, my lord, without the palace gate.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Bring them before us.

speaker: MACBETH
text: To be thus is nothing,

speaker: MACBETH
text: But to be safely thus. Our fears in Banquo

speaker: MACBETH
text: Stick deep, and in his royalty of nature

speaker: MACBETH
text: Reigns that which would be feared. ’Tis much he dares,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And to that dauntless temper of his mind

speaker: MACBETH
text: He hath a wisdom that doth guide his valor

speaker: MACBETH
text: To act in safety. There is none but he

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose being I do fear; and under him

speaker: MACBETH
text: My genius is rebuked, as it is said

speaker: MACBETH
text: Mark Antony’s was by Caesar. He chid the sisters

speaker: MACBETH
text: When first they put the name of king upon me

speaker: MACBETH
text: And bade them speak to him. Then, prophet-like,

speaker: MACBETH
text: They hailed him father to a line of kings.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Upon my head they placed a fruitless crown

speaker: MACBETH
text: And put a barren scepter in my grip,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thence to be wrenched with an unlineal hand,

speaker: MACBETH
text: No son of mine succeeding. If ’t be so,

speaker: MACBETH
text: For Banquo’s issue have I filed my mind;

speaker: MACBETH
text: For them the gracious Duncan have I murdered,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Put rancors in the vessel of my peace

speaker: MACBETH
text: Only for them, and mine eternal jewel

speaker: MACBETH
text: Given to the common enemy of man

speaker: MACBETH
text: To make them kings, the seeds of Banquo kings.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Rather than so, come fate into the list,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And champion me to th’ utterance.—Who’s there?

speaker: MACBETH
text:
To
                 
                the
                 
                Servant
                .
                 
              Now go to the door, and stay there till we call.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Was it not yesterday we spoke together?

speaker: MURDERERS
text: It was, so please your Highness.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Well then, now

speaker: MACBETH
text: Have you considered of my speeches? Know

speaker: MACBETH
text: That it was he, in the times past, which held you

speaker: MACBETH
text: So under fortune, which you thought had been

speaker: MACBETH
text: Our innocent self. This I made good to you

speaker: MACBETH
text: In our last conference, passed in probation with you

speaker: MACBETH
text: How you were borne in hand, how crossed, the instruments,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Who wrought with them, and all things else that might

speaker: MACBETH
text: To half a soul and to a notion crazed

speaker: MACBETH
text: Say “Thus did Banquo.”

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: You made it known to us.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I did so, and went further, which is now

speaker: MACBETH
text: Our point of second meeting. Do you find

speaker: MACBETH
text: Your patience so predominant in your nature

speaker: MACBETH
text: That you can let this go? Are you so gospeled

speaker: MACBETH
text: To pray for this good man and for his issue,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose heavy hand hath bowed you to the grave

speaker: MACBETH
text: And beggared yours forever?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: We are men, my liege.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Ay, in the catalogue you go for men,

speaker: MACBETH
text: As hounds and greyhounds, mongrels, spaniels, curs,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Shoughs, water-rugs, and demi-wolves are clept

speaker: MACBETH
text: All by the name of dogs. The valued file

speaker: MACBETH
text: Distinguishes the swift, the slow, the subtle,

speaker: MACBETH
text: The housekeeper, the hunter, every one

speaker: MACBETH
text: According to the gift which bounteous nature

speaker: MACBETH
text: Hath in him closed; whereby he does receive

speaker: MACBETH
text: Particular addition, from the bill

speaker: MACBETH
text: That writes them all alike. And so of men.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Now, if you have a station in the file,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Not i’ th’ worst rank of manhood, say ’t,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And I will put that business in your bosoms

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose execution takes your enemy off,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Grapples you to the heart and love of us,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Who wear our health but sickly in his life,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Which in his death were perfect.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: I am one, my liege,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: Whom the vile blows and buffets of the world

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: Hath so incensed that I am reckless what

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: I do to spite the world.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: And I another

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: So weary with disasters, tugged with fortune,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: That I would set my life on any chance,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: To mend it or be rid on ’t.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Both of you

speaker: MACBETH
text: Know Banquo was your enemy.

speaker: MURDERERS
text: True, my lord.

speaker: MACBETH
text: So is he mine, and in such bloody distance

speaker: MACBETH
text: That every minute of his being thrusts

speaker: MACBETH
text: Against my near’st of life. And though I could

speaker: MACBETH
text: With barefaced power sweep him from my sight

speaker: MACBETH
text: And bid my will avouch it, yet I must not,

speaker: MACBETH
text: For certain friends that are both his and mine,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose loves I may not drop, but wail his fall

speaker: MACBETH
text: Who I myself struck down. And thence it is

speaker: MACBETH
text: That I to your assistance do make love,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Masking the business from the common eye

speaker: MACBETH
text: For sundry weighty reasons.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: We shall, my lord,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MURDERER
text: Perform what you command us.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              MURDERER
text: Though our lives—

speaker: MACBETH
text: Your spirits shine through you. Within this hour at most

speaker: MACBETH
text: I will advise you where to plant yourselves,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Acquaint you with the perfect spy o’ th’ time,

speaker: MACBETH
text: The moment on ’t, for ’t must be done tonight

speaker: MACBETH
text: And something from the palace; always thought

speaker: MACBETH
text: That I require a clearness. And with him

speaker: MACBETH
text: (To leave no rubs nor botches in the work)

speaker: MACBETH
text: Fleance, his son, that keeps him company,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose absence is no less material to me

speaker: MACBETH
text: Than is his father’s, must embrace the fate

speaker: MACBETH
text: Of that dark hour. Resolve yourselves apart.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I’ll come to you anon.

speaker: MURDERERS
text: We are resolved, my lord.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I’ll call upon you straight. Abide within.

speaker: MACBETH
text: It is concluded. Banquo, thy soul’s flight,

speaker: MACBETH
text: If it find heaven, must find it out tonight.
